name: Volcano Smash
description: Double smash patty with ghost pepper aioli, caramelized onions, and lava sauce on a brioche bun.

name: Classic Smash
description: Single smash patty with American cheese, pickles, mustard, and ketchup on a potato bun.

name: Loco Moco Smash
description: Smash patty over rice with brown gravy and a fried egg. Local style done right.

name: Puna Fries
description: Thick-cut fries tossed in island seasoning with your choice of dipping sauce.

name: Lilikoi Lemonade
description: Fresh-squeezed lemonade with passion fruit syrup. Perfectly chilled.
